title: Reader Enhancements: Share Sheet, Selectable Text, and Comments Link
description: Non-runnable feature container. All implementation, testing, documentation, and review work lives in children. Covers: commentsURL on the Article model, .textSelection(.enabled) on body/summary text, ShareLink in both reader toolbars, a disabled-until-backend-ships comments toolbar button in both readers, and Article decoding unit tests.
acceptance_criteria: xcodebuild test exits 0 including new Article decoding tests
Reader toolbar has a Share action in both ArticleDetailView and ArticlePagerView; tapping it presents the iOS share sheet with article title + URL
Share shares the currently-visible article in both standalone and paged reader contexts
Article body and summary text are selectable and copyable via long-press
Text selection does not break vertical scrolling or horizontal page-swipe gestures
Comments toolbar button is present in both reader toolbars; it is disabled when the article has no commentsURL and enabled (opening in-app SafariView) when commentsURL is non-nil
No conditional content (if) inside .toolbar — buttons use .disabled, not conditional inclusion
No hardcoded hex colors; Liquid Glass conventions preserved
